message:
fix(deps): use git dependency for asupersync instead of path

Path dependencies break when frankensqlite is consumed via git
(e.g., by cass). Changed asupersync from path="../asupersync" to
a pinned git rev so downstream consumers can resolve the dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
